---
title: "CV"
format:
  html:
    theme: none
    css: cv-style.css
    toc: false
    number-sections: false
    page-layout: custom
    margin-left: 0.5in
    margin-right: 0.5in
    margin-top: 0.5in
    margin-bottom: 0.5in
execute:
  echo: false
---

```{python}
#| echo: false
# Data will be injected here by Python
import json
import os

# Load data from temporary JSON file
with open('temp_cv_data.json', 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    cv_data = json.load(f)

personal_info = cv_data['personal_info']
professional_summary = cv_data['professional_summary']
experiences = cv_data['experiences']
education = cv_data['education']
skills_by_category = cv_data['skills_by_category']
awards = cv_data.get('awards', [])
certifications = cv_data.get('certifications', [])
publications = cv_data.get('publications', [])
```

::: {.cv-container}

::: {.cv-header}
# `{python} personal_info['name']`
## `{python} professional_summary`

::: {.contact-info}
`{python} personal_info['contact']['email']` | `{python} personal_info['contact']['phone']` | `{python} personal_info['contact'].get('address_display', '')`  
[LinkedIn](`{python} personal_info['contact']['linkedin']`) | [Website](`{python} personal_info['contact']['website']`)
:::
:::

::: {.cv-body}

::: {.cv-left-column}

## Professional Experience

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
for exp in experiences:
    location_str = exp['location']['city']
    if exp['location'].get('state'):
        location_str += f", {exp['location']['state']}"
    
    print(f"::: {{.experience-item}}")
    print(f"### {exp['company']} | {exp['title']}")
    print(f"::: {{.experience-meta}}")
    print(f"{location_str} | {exp['start_date']} - {exp['end_date']}")
    print(f":::")
    print()
    
    if exp.get('achievements'):
        for achievement in exp['achievements']:
            print(f"• {achievement['text']}")
    print()
    print(f":::")
    print()
```

## Education

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
for edu in education:
    location_str = f"{edu['location']['city']}, {edu['location']['state']}"
    print(f"::: {{.education-item}}")
    print(f"### {edu['degree']} {edu['field']}")
    print(f"**{edu['institution']}** | {location_str} | {edu['end_year']}")
    print(f":::")
    print()
```

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
if publications:
    print("## Selected Publications")
    print()
    for pub in publications:
        print(f"::: {{.publication-item}}")
        print(f"{pub['formatted_citation']}")
        print(f":::")
        print()
```

:::

::: {.cv-right-column}

## Core Skills

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
for category_data in skills_by_category:
    print(f"::: {{.skills-category}}")
    print(f"### {category_data['category']}")
    for skill in category_data['skills']:
        years_text = f" ({skill['years']} years)" if skill.get('years') else ""
        print(f"• {skill['name']}{years_text}")
    print(f":::")
    print()
```

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
if awards:
    print("## Awards & Recognition")
    print()
    for award in awards:
        print(f"::: {{.award-item}}")
        print(f"**{award['title']}** ({award['year']})")
        print(f"{award['description']}")
        print(f":::")
        print()
```

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
if certifications:
    print("## Certifications")
    print()
    for cert in certifications:
        year_text = f" ({cert['year']})" if cert.get('year') else ""
        print(f"::: {{.cert-item}}")
        print(f"**{cert['name']}**{year_text}")
        if cert.get('issuer'):
            print(f"*{cert['issuer']}*")
        print(f":::")
        print()
```

:::

:::

:::
